item.title: Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension for D11 Hub
item.description: The shop builds and tests a custom tool extension designed for the massive D11 hub. How does this innovation handle the extreme demands of heavy equipment repair?

media:content.media:title: Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension for D11 Hub
media:content.media:description: The shop builds and tests a custom tool extension designed for the massive D11 hub. How does this innovation handle the extreme demands of heavy equipment repair?

item.title: Broken Cylinder Eye Gets a Makeover
item.description: A worn‑out cylinder eye heads to the workshop for repair. What machining and welding steps can bring this critical part back to life?

media:content.media:title: Broken Cylinder Eye Gets a Makeover
media:content.media:description: A worn‑out cylinder eye heads to the workshop for repair. What machining and welding steps can bring this critical part back to life?

item.title: Solid Welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i
item.description: Mounts are going onto a brand‑new barrel as Kurtis lays down precision welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i. What makes this machine a go‑to for heavy fabrication work?

media:content.media:title: Solid Welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i
media:content.media:description: Mounts are going onto a brand‑new barrel as Kurtis lays down precision welds with the WIA Weldmatic 500i. What makes this machine a go‑to for heavy fabrication work?

item.title: Building a New Boom End and Fall Block
item.description: Instead of patching, the workshop builds a brand‑new boom end and fall block from scratch. How does this fabrication strengthen the crane’s future?

media:content.media:title: Building a New Boom End and Fall Block
media:content.media:description: Instead of patching, the workshop builds a brand‑new boom end and fall block from scratch. How does this fabrication strengthen the crane’s future?

item.title: Thread Cutting on CAT 24M End Caps
item.description: Cutting clean, precise threads on CAT 24M end caps demands steady hands and sharp tooling. What makes this machining process so critical?

media:content.media:title: Thread Cutting on CAT 24M End Caps
media:content.media:description: Cutting clean, precise threads on CAT 24M end caps demands steady hands and sharp tooling. What makes this machining process so critical?

item.title: Making the Handle for the Drop Bottom Bin
item.description: Kurtis takes pride in crafting a handle for the heavy‑duty drop bottom bin. What shop skills make this custom tool both strong and reliable?

media:content.media:description: Kurtis takes pride in crafting a handle for the heavy‑duty drop bottom bin. What shop skills make this custom tool both strong and reliable?

item.title: Broken Cylinder Eye Alert
item.description: A broken cylinder eye threatens heavy‑duty performance. What machining and repair steps will restore strength to this vital component?

item.title: CAT Soil Compactor: New Blade Skin
item.description: The CAT soil compactor receives a fresh blade skin, boosting durability and performance. How does this upgrade improve heavy‑duty work in the field?

media:content.media:description: The CAT soil compactor receives a fresh blade skin, boosting durability and performance. How does this upgrade improve heavy‑duty work in the field?

item.title: Restoring Our Timeless Yard Crane
item.description: A classic yard crane gets a new lease on life through careful restoration. What engineering steps bring this timeless machine back into action?

media:content.media:title: Restoring Our Timeless Yard Crane
media:content.media:description: A classic yard crane gets a new lease on life through careful restoration. What engineering steps bring this timeless machine back into action?

item.title: Overhauling a Hitachi EH4000 Track Rod
item.description: Watch the overhaul of a Hitachi EH4000 track rod, where machining precision and engineering skill come together. How will this repair restore heavy‑duty performance?

media:content.media:title: Overhauling a Hitachi EH4000 Track Rod
media:content.media:description: Watch the overhaul of a Hitachi EH4000 track rod, where machining precision and engineering skill come together. How will this repair restore heavy‑duty performance?

item.title: New Piston in the Works for Hydraulic Cylinder
item.description: See the machining of a new piston for a hydraulic cylinder, built for durability and precision. How will this upgrade improve operation?

media:content.media:description: See the machining of a new piston for a hydraulic cylinder, built for durability and precision. How will this upgrade improve operation?

item.title: Building a Big Lathe Tool Post
item.description: When the workshop needed a heavy‑duty lathe tool post, the solution was to build one from scratch. What challenges come with making your own powerful tool?

media:content.media:title: Building a Big Lathe Tool Post
media:content.media:description: When the workshop needed a heavy‑duty lathe tool post, the solution was to build one from scratch. What challenges come with making your own powerful tool?

item.title: Machining Custom Mounts for Line Boring Machine
item.description: Precision machining brings custom mounts to life for the line boring machine. How do these mounts improve accuracy and performance in heavy‑duty work?

media:content.media:description: Precision machining brings custom mounts to life for the line boring machine. How do these mounts improve accuracy and performance in heavy‑duty work?

item.title: Spindle Clamps on the Milling Machine
item.description: Watch as spindle clamps are machined on the milling machine for a heavy‑duty tool post grinder. How will these clamps enhance performance?

item.description: See custom shop‑made tools in action as precision bearing mounts are machined. What engineering marvels make this possible?

item.title: Sir Meccanica Package Arrival
item.description: Discover what’s inside the package from Sir Meccanica, delivered straight to the workshop. What new tools or parts await?

media:content.media:title: Sir Meccanica Package Arrival
media:content.media:description: Discover what’s inside the package from Sir Meccanica, delivered straight to the workshop. What new tools or parts await?

item.title: Heavy Duty Roller Stands
item.description: Step by step how to make heavy duty roller stands! These stands will be used in our machining area to support long jobs that go through the spindle headstock of the lathe. We already have a stand but it’s not very functional so we’re going to make something better. To make these stands we are using steel plate, solid bar, hollow bar, roller wheels and a few other bits and pieces.

media:content.media:title: Heavy Duty Roller Stands
media:content.media:description: Step by step how to make heavy duty roller stands! These stands will be used in our machining area to support long jobs that go through the spindle headstock of the lathe. We already have a stand but it’s not very functional so we’re going to make something better. To make these stands we are using steel plate, solid bar, hollow bar, roller wheels and a few other bits and pieces.
